name: Obsidian Sentinels
description: Ancient guardians forged from obsidian and infused with elemental energy. 50 unique sentinels standing watch over the Bitcoin blockchain. Each sentinel features randomized elements, helms, builds, eye shapes, and energy vein patterns across 6 rarities.

deployment._uriDesign: OP721 tokenURI() returns: baseURI + tokenId.toString(). Files in IPFS folder must be named 1, 2, 3 (NO .json extension).
deployment.hiddenURINote: Folder of 50 identical hidden metadata JSONs (uploaded & pinned)
deployment.revealBaseURINote: Folder of 50 real metadata JSONs (uploaded & pinned). Use with setBaseURI() to reveal.
deployment.baseURI_localNote: For local dev only — files need to be accessible as /nfts/1, /nfts/2 etc.
